summaryForNext: Backend: openspec, driven by /kbd-apply (one task/turn). 3 changes in dependency order; first pending: add-agent-delegate-classification (G1, the linchpin). Per-change QA: artifact-refiner + separated security review (all three touch auth/budget) + a fail-closed/spoof/degrades_to_deny test each; archive via --skip-specs. ZERO new deps (reuse derived_kind, BudgetScope/BackendUnavailablePosture, metrics.rs). Guardrail: federate any JWKS IdM, Ory reference, never an IdP (load-bearing in change 1). Sync progress.json then advance waypoint in SEPARATE commands (pipeline-enforce hook).
